mapper.insert: INSERT INTO goal_members (goal_id, user_id, role) VALUES (#{goalId}, #{userId}, #{role}) ON CONFLICT (goal_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.goal_id, m.user_id, m.role, m.joined_at, m.last_seen, u.display_name, u.email FROM goal_members m JOIN users u ON u.id = m.user_id WHERE m.goal_id = #{goalId} ORDER BY m.joined_at
SELECT role FROM goal_members WHERE goal_id = #{goalId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM goal_members WHERE goal_id = #{goalId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE goal_members SET last_seen = NOW() WHERE goal_id = #{goalId} AND user_id = #{userId}
